summary: Iteration 46: SYNCHRONISATION COMPLÈTE LOTTOLAB - All sync features verified. Super Admin data propagates correctly to Company Admin and Vendeur. 18/18 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Super Admin sees 5 companies, Company Admin sees 236 lotteries and 403 schedules, Vendeur sees open lotteries and results.
critical_code_review_comments: super_admin_routes.py: toggle_lottery_global correctly syncs is_active_global to company_lotteries with disabled_by_super_admin flag
company_routes.py: /company/lotteries reads from master_lotteries with is_active_global=True filter, merges with company_lotteries customizations
sync_routes.py: /device/config returns enabled_lotteries from company_lotteries joined with master_lotteries, includes is_open calculation
saas_core.py: /global-schedules update fixed to use global_schedules collection (line 652)
Flag propagation: update_lottery_flags syncs flag_type to company_lotteries (lines 902-908)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration46_sync.py - New test file for sync verification
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - no new seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: SYNCHRONISATION COMPLÈTE verified. All data flows correctly: Super Admin → Company Admin → Vendeur. Key counts: 236 lotteries, 403 schedules, 10+ results visible across all roles. Flag changes (HAITI/USA) propagate to company_lotteries. Device config returns correct lotteries with is_open status.
